LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANTS PING LING AND TEH LIU'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. CROSS-DEFENDANTS ONLY SET FORTH ARGUMENTS IN THEIR MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AS TO WHY THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES SHOULD BE STRICKEN. CROSS-DEFENDANTS SET FORTH NO ARGUMENTS ABOUT WHY THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION OR WHY IT IS UNCERTAIN. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY PLEADS FACTS SUFFICIENT TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DENNIS LIU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Case settled. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUTH CORNELL OF THE LAW FIRM OF KOLETSKY & MONCINI E. AL., TEL. NO. (213) 427-2350 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT PING LING AND TEH LIU;
ATTY. SZE HANG LO, TEL. NO. (510) 228-5388 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT HDC CONSTRUCTION.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS PING LING and TEH LIU's AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT is Overruled. Cross-Defendants only set forth arguments in their Memorandum of Points and Authorities as to why the prayer for punitive damages should be stricken. Cross-Defendants set forth no arguments about why the fifth cause of action fails to state a cause of action or why it is uncertain. The Cross-Complaint adequately pleads facts sufficient to state a cause of action for fraud. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUTH CORNELL OF THE LAW FIRM OF KOLETSKY & MONCINI E. AL., TEL. NO. (213) 427-2350 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS/CROSS-DEFENDANT PING LING AND TEH LIU;
ATTY. SZE HANG LO, TEL. NO. (510) 228-5388 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-COMPLAINANT HD CONSTRUCTION, INC.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS PING LING and TEH LIU's AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF CROSS-COMPLAINT is Denied. The Cross-Complaint adequately pleads fraud to support a prayer for punitive damages. (Cross-Complaint, pars. 26-30.). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
